intent_precise:
Plate Loading for ddPCR: Using tube_block (labware, slot 4 Degree Tube Block). With temperature module. (1) Set temperature to 4°C. (2) Transfer 6µL from source to destination. (3) Wait 10 seconds. (4) Pause: format (5) Wait 2 seconds. (6) Wait 2 seconds. (7) Wait 2 seconds. (8) Pause: Please load remaining samples in
                                     column-wise order starting with A1 like
                                     A1-D1, A2-D2 etc.) and
                                     postive control (last) in temperature
                                     block. (9) Transfer 6µL from source to destination.
intent: For the ddPCR plate loading protocol, start by setting the tube block in slot 4 to 4°C, then transfer 6µL from your source to the destination well and wait 10 seconds before pausing to format. During the pause, load your remaining samples in column-wise order starting with A1 (so A1-D1, then A2-D2, etc.) and place your positive control last in the temperature block. After loading is complete, transfer another 6µL from source to destination to finish the protocol.

commands.message:
Please load remaining samples in
                                     column-wise order starting with A1 like
                                     A1-D1, A2-D2 etc.) and
                                     postive control (last) in temperature
                                     block.
